layout.subtitle: Manage your account, player profile, and creator profile in one place.

player.title: Player profile
player.intro: Options for how your clears and profile appear to others will show here as they become available.
player.openProfileNewTab: View public player profile (opens in new tab)
player.noPlayerBody: Your account is not linked to a player profile yet.
player.previewHint: Preview matches your live player profile. Switch back to this tab after changes elsewhere to refresh.

creator.previewHint: Preview updates as you change header badges (saved when you click Save).
creator.title: Creator profile
creator.intro: Customize how your creator profile looks, including header curation badges.
creator.openPublicProfileNewTab: View public creator profile (opens in new tab)
creator.noCreatorBody: Your account is not linked to a creator profile yet.
creator.loadErrorBody: Try again later or open your public profile.
